result.summary: Airtable exposes developer-facing APIs and extension tooling, but this corpus only confirms OAuth 2.0 authentication metadata and developer docs pages; specific public programmatic endpoints beyond the API docs landing page are not determinable from the corpus alone.

airtable_oauth_app.label: Airtable OAuth app
airtable_oauth_app.setup: Create and manage an OAuth integration from Airtable's developer area at [Developers](https://airtable.com/developers). The detected OAuth endpoints are `https://airtable.com/oauth2/v1/authorize`, `https://airtable.com/oauth2/v1/token`, and dynamic client registration at `https://airtable.com/oauth2/v1/register`. Request scopes such as `data.records:read`, `data.records:write`, `schema.bases:read`, `schema.bases:write`, `data.recordComments:read`, `data.recordComments:write`, and `workspacesAndBases:read` as needed for your app.

surfaces.name: Airtable Web API
surfaces.notes: The corpus confirms an Airtable Web API exists, and developer terms state integrations use Airtable APIs. However, no machine-readable OpenAPI document, concrete base API hostname, or request auth binding for this API appears in the corpus.
